review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json

C00.summary: Actual Claude CLI final re-review verified h00_preflight_scope_inventory is bound to RP00.P00.M08.S01, defines H00 preflight field scope only, includes all required fields, documents command_receipts -> commands and the two evidence_summary nested aliases, preserves metadata-only/no-real-data/writes_product_state=false/no-RP00-closeout/C00-dependency/human-approval/next-boundary controls, and makes no production mutation or real-data claims.

findings.title: Prior nested-alias P3 note is resolved
findings.details: field_aliases now documents command_receipts -> commands and the two evidence_summary nested fields for claude_review_dependency and human_approval_boundary. The validator enforces logical_field, artifact_field, status, and rationale for all three.

findings.title: Recorded weighted-ledger generator-alignment deferral remains open
findings.details: RP00.P00.M08.S01 carries deferred_generator_alignment to RP00.P00.M10.S01 because the weighted ledger generator uses generic P00 profile labels while IDs, source_micro_phase_id, requirement refs, and gate refs remain authoritative.
findings.recommendation: Carry the deferral forward to RP00.P00.M10.S01 as already recorded; no change needed for this subphase.

parsed_review.review_notes: Actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only CLI final re-review completed with PASS and no P0/P1/P2 findings. Earlier P3 findings for command_receipts aliasing and nested claude_review_dependency/human_approval_boundary locations were fixed before this final re-review. The remaining generator-alignment P3 is a recorded non-blocking deferral.
